ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a reference to Andrea Santamaria`s affiliation to the Oziosi academy in Naples and the Umoristi academy in Rome see Gio. Battista Bergazzano, Il Vindicato Sdegno, Naples, 1630.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
